step.name: verify-foundation
step.action: Confirm tokens codified + naming consistent + stories ≥80 %.

step.name: wire-doc-gen
step.action: Wire generator to emit Markdown per component into docs/.

step.name: wire-token-scanner
step.action: Scanner runs in CI; blocks merge on hardcoded values.

step.name: wire-variant-gen
step.action: Generate permutations capped per component; route through visreg.

step.name: review-and-publish
step.action: Human review queue; publish on approval.
